GEC SME Program — Campaign Hub

Slides + Captions · all in one place · Cohort 1 · June 11, 2026

Today's Action Checklist — May 5, 2026

  • Create application form → copy URL → replace all sme.gecbusiness.com in every file
  • Brief design team: images needed TODAY for Post 01, Post 04, Post 08, Post 12
  • Post GEC-01 on Facebook + Instagram (Founder Bottleneck — most urgent for reach)
  • Post GEC-12 on Facebook + Instagram + LinkedIn (Applications Open)
  • Send mentor frame + caption + posting instructions to all 13 mentors (WhatsApp/email)
  • Assign mentor posting window May 19–24 — ask each mentor to confirm their day
  • Launch AD-01 (FB/IG Founder Hook) — $120, May 5–12
  • Launch AD-03 (LinkedIn 89% stat) — $130, May 5–18
  • Send TBC Bank outreach email (Bank Pack, Template 1)
  • Send Bank of Georgia outreach email (Bank Pack, Template 1)
  • Add landing page link to GEC Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn bio/about
  • Registration closes May 31 — add this date to all open posts now
  • Interviews run June 1–5 — prepare selection criteria with GEC team
  • Program start: June 11 — confirm venue/format with confirmed participants after June 5

Posting Calendar — May 5 to June 11

DatePost(s)PlatformNotes
May 5GEC-01 + GEC-12FB / IG / LILaunch day — post both. GEC-12 on all 3 platforms. AD-01 + AD-03 go live.
May 6GEC-03 + GEC-14LinkedInLinkedIn credibility push — 89% stat + founding cohort framing
May 7GEC-04FB / IGFull roster reveal — "This Room" — highest expected engagement
May 8GEC-05LinkedInGeorge Simongulashvili mentor spotlight. Start AD-02.
May 9GEC-02FacebookCourses didn't work — FB audience responds strongly to this
May 10GEC-06FB / IGIro Tsagareishvili spotlight — Forbes credential, strong reach
May 11GEC-07FB / IGIa Tsulaia spotlight — HR/OD angle
May 12GEC-08FB / IG40-week roadmap carousel/infographic — save/share driver
May 13GEC-09LinkedInROI calculation — 116 ₾/hr math. Start AD-04 retargeting.
May 14GEC-10FB / LIGoldman Sachs 10KSB benchmark — credibility heavy
May 15GEC-11InstagramEU4Georgia stat card — clean visual, strong numbers
May 16GEC-13 StoriesInstagram3-story series — application deadline reminder
May 17Repost best performerFB / IGBoost whichever GEC post has highest engagement so far.
May 19Mentors: George, Iro, Davit, KetiFB / IG (each)Group 1 mentor posts — each posts their own frame + caption
May 20Mentors: Ia, Roman, EkaFB / IG (each)Group 2 mentor posts
May 21Mentors: Tea, NinoFB / IG (each)Group 3 mentor posts
May 22–24Mentors: Lia, Giorgi, Beka, DeaFB / IG (each)Group 4 mentor posts — staggered over 3 days
May 26GEC-13 StoriesInstagram3-story series + registration closing reminder (May 31)
May 29GEC-12 (urgency update)All"Registration closes May 31" — update caption, repost on all platforms
May 31Registration closes—Last day to apply. Post a final reminder story/post in the evening.
June 1–5Interviews (internal)—No new posts needed. Optional: "We're reviewing applications" story update.
June 8–10Participant announcementAll"Cohort 1 is confirmed" — optional teaser post before launch
June 11Launch Day Post (write fresh)AllCohort 1 starts today — welcome post from GEC

Budget — $500 Total

$320
Facebook & Instagram
AD-01 Founder Hook: $120 (May 5–12)
AD-02 Social Proof: $100 (May 8–15)
AD-04 Retargeting: $100 (May 13–22)
$130
LinkedIn
AD-03 Professional (89% stat): $130 (May 5–18)
Target: Business owners, GEO, 500+ connections, 10+ yrs exp
$50
Tools & Scheduling
Buffer/Later for post scheduling
Canva Pro for image design (if needed)
$500
Total
20 days · 14 organic posts · 4 ad campaigns
13 mentor amplification posts (zero cost)

Sales Activation — Banks & Associations

  • TBC Bank: send one-pager + email template 1 (Bank Pack)
  • Bank of Georgia: send one-pager + email template 1 (Bank Pack)
  • Follow up with bank contacts in 3 days if no reply
  • GEC member organizations: forward program one-pager + personal note
  • Georgian Employers Association: send announcement
  • 3 warm personal referrals from GEC board — ask directly for 1 intro each

AD-01FB/IG Lead Gen — Founder Bottleneck Hook
Objective
Lead Generation (application form)
Budget
$120 total · ~$15/day · 8 days
Audience
Georgia · 35–58 · Business owners / entrepreneurs · Interests: business management, entrepreneurship, SME · Custom: exclude existing followers
Format
Single image (use GEC-01 visual) or short video · 1:1 ratio for feed · Link in button: sme.gecbusiness.com

Objective

Budget
$130 total · ~$9.30/day · 14 days
Audience
Georgia · Business owners / Founders / CEOs / MDs · Company size: 10–200 employees · Seniority: Director, VP, Owner · 500+ connections preferred · Exclude: startups under 3 years

AD-04 May 13–22 Facebook / Instagram $100 · Paid Ad · Retargeting
AD-04FB/IG Retargeting — Urgency ([X] Spots Left)
Objective
Conversions (application form submission)
Budget
$100 total · ~$10/day · 10 days
Audience
RETARGETING: people who visited landing page / clicked AD-01 or AD-02 / engaged with GEC posts but did not submit form · Also: website custom audience (pixel)
Format
Bold urgency graphic — navy background, large "[X] ადგილი დარჩა" in gold · Update [X] every 2 days manually
CTA Button
Apply Now

How to use this template
